creator: mail@rudybrinkman.nl
text:
An update for the list at 
http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html

Asus M2A-VM. 
SATA Raid1 is not supported, FreeBSD reports that there are no harddisks in the machine (during installation).

Fix: 

install 3Ware RAID controller?
How-To-Repeat: n/a
